_comment: Remplace BACKLOG.md -- format compact pour studio-director v2

tasks.title: HUD faction bars — show 5 faction rep bars in HUD overlay
tasks.notes: DONE cycle 27. Verified fully implemented (buildFactionPanel+updateHUD+store.subscribe). Upgraded FACTION_COLORS to vivid palette: druides=#6abf69 anciens=#e8c84c korrigans=#b888e8 niamh=#8ab4f8 ankou=#e05c5c.

tasks.title: Ambient audio deferred bug — menu silent when no interaction during boot
tasks.notes: DONE cycle 27. Added pendingAmbientType: AmbientType | null to SFXManager.ts. startAmbient() queues type when ctx suspended. resumeOnInteraction() retries startAmbient(pendingAmbientType) after ctx.resume() resolves.

tasks.title: Card options mobile layout — 3-column breaks at 375px narrow viewport
tasks.notes: DONE cycle 28. @media (max-width:560px) { .card-options { flex-direction:column } .card-option { max-width:100%; min-width:unset } } added to index.html. Tooltip @media 700px rule already present.

tasks.title: Card selection feedback — brief highlight before overlay disappears
tasks.notes: DONE cycle 28. CardOverlay.ts: btn.classList.add('card-option-selected'), hideCard()+resolve() deferred 200ms via setTimeout. CSS .card-option-selected { background:rgba(201,168,76,0.3); border-color:#c9a84c; transition:none } added to index.html.

tasks.title: Minigame overlay visual distinction — subtle blue tint vs card dark bg
tasks.notes: DONE cycle 28. #minigame-overlay background changed from rgba(10,10,18,0.9) to rgba(5,8,18,0.93) in index.html.

tasks.title: Boot progress bar snaps to 100% on skip
tasks.notes: DONE cycle 28. main.ts skip(): querySelector('.boot-progress-fill') then style.animation='none', style.width='100%' before resolve(). Satisfying snap-to-complete on early skip.

tasks.title: Boot screen — Celtic logo SVG + animated progress bar before main menu
tasks.notes: Add #boot-screen div above #loading in index.html. Celtic knot SVG (pure CSS or inline SVG path). Animated progress bar 0->100% over 2.5s. After complete: fade out boot-screen, reveal main menu scene. z-index 200.

tasks.title: Main menu cinematic — Three.js cliff+sea scene, animated waves, camera dolly to tower
tasks.notes: New web-demo/src/scenes/MainMenuScene.ts. Cliff geometry + animated ocean (sine wave vertex shader). Animated fog. Static tower silhouette. Camera dolly path (CatmullRom, lerp 4s) from cliff viewpoint to tower window. Expose initMainMenu(container), startMenuDolly(), onDollyComplete callback.

tasks.title: Merlin's lair hub — clickable 3D interior with 4 navigation zones
tasks.notes: DONE cycle 22. MerlinLairScene.ts — stone walls, floor, beams, 4 raycaster zones (map/crystal/bookshelf/door), candle flicker+particles, dust motes, cauldron steam, potions, skull. State machine BOOT→MENU→LAIR→GAME wired in main.ts.

tasks.title: Forest walk rework — fixed rail path, bob-head, no free camera
tasks.notes: In CameraRail.ts: add bob-head (sinusoidal Y offset, 2Hz, amplitude 0.04). Remove/lock any OrbitControls. Auto-advance at 0.8 units/sec. Rail uses existing CatmullRom spline. Apply to CoastBiome scene.

tasks.title: VFX pass — god rays, candle particles, sea spray, dust motes
tasks.notes: God ray: additive sprite above cliff horizon (SpriteMaterial, AdditiveBlending, animated opacity). Sea spray: Points geometry 200 particles, random upward velocity, reset at apex, fade on lifetime. Dust motes in future LairScene.

tasks.title: Scene transition manager — fade overlay between BOOT→MENU→LAIR→GAME states
tasks.notes: New web-demo/src/ui/SceneTransition.ts. Black div overlay, opacity transition 0.6s. API: transition(fromState, toState, onMidpoint). State enum: BOOT, MENU, LAIR, GAME. Used by main.ts state machine.

tasks.title: SFX implementation — hook Web Audio API tones to merlin_sfx event bus
tasks.notes: DONE cycle 22. SFXManager.ts — 5 procedural sounds (flip/win/lose/unlock/end). AudioContext resumed on first user interaction. Silent-fail wrapper. initSFXManager() called at top of main().

tasks.title: Mobile layout pass — verify card overlay and minigame canvases fit on 375px viewport
tasks.notes: T057 added touch support. Verify CSS on narrow screens: minigame canvases 380-400px wide may overflow 375px viewport. Add max-width:100% + max-height on canvas elements. Scale minigame title font-size for mobile. Check card-container padding at 375px.

tasks.title: Externalize FASTROUTE_TEMPLATES to public/data/cards.json -- bundle at 303KB, 1KB from cap
tasks.notes: DONE cycle 14. CardSystem.ts now loads via fetch() from public/data/cards.json. Bundle dropped to 91KB app.

tasks.title: Late-game heal scaling: halve HEAL_LIFE applied after card 20 in EffectEngine
tasks.notes: T040 reduced ceiling but cautious healer still +2.47/card at stage2 (drain -2). Fix: in EffectEngine.applyEffects(), if store.run.cardsPlayed > 20, apply Math.round(amount * 0.5) for HEAL_LIFE. Avoids surprise punish, reduces late heal avg from 4.47 to ~2.2, making stage2 net-negative for all strategies.

tasks.title: Full loop integration audit
tasks.notes: Cycle 9: All 14 minigames in switch, OghamPanel wired, EffectEngine calls verified, game loop 11-step flow intact.

tasks.title: Error resilience -- try/catch LLM + minigame + effects
tasks.notes: Cycle 9: 3 try/catch guards added. Card gen fallback, minigame neutral score 50, effect skip. Game loop never crashes.

tasks.title: T001 white scenes diagnostic (code-only)
tasks.notes: Cycle 9: Root cause identified. Fix requires editor. See worker_visual.json for next_steps.

tasks.title: Card quality pass -- 166 templates
tasks.notes: Cycle 9: All 166 templates pass. 3 options each, no duplicate verbs, no narrative length violations, all effects non-empty.

tasks.title: Fog shader optimization -- maintain 60fps on GTX 1060
tasks.notes: Cycle 13 DONE: noise() 4->2 trig ops, edgeFade 4 smoothstep->1 radial, uDensity 0.35->0.25, DoubleSide->FrontSide. ~44% fragment cost reduction estimated.

tasks.title: Reduce avg heal ceiling to increase late-game tension
tasks.notes: Cycle 13 DONE: HEAL_LIFE cap 7->5 in GroqAdapter + 59 templates clamped in CardSystem + constraints updated. Avg heal option 5.6->4.47 (-20%). Mixed-play now net-negative at stage2. Cautious healer still positive -- T042 needed.

tasks.title: Implement regard minigame (memorize/reproduce shapes)
tasks.notes: 13th minigame. Cycle 8: Memory sequence with 3 rounds (4/5/6 symbols), 3s memorize, click order from shuffled 5x3 grid.

tasks.title: Implement echo minigame (follow sound intensity)
tasks.notes: 14th and final minigame. Cycle 8: Visual-only sound direction, 6 rounds, symbol flashes in 1 of 4 quadrants, 1.2s window.

tasks.title: Generate 20 FastRoute cards for collines_dolmens + anciens
tasks.notes: 8th biome card set. Cycle 8: 20 cards, dolmen/hill themes, druides capped at 4, all field quotas met.

tasks.title: Generate 20 FastRoute cards for iles_mystiques + niamh
tasks.notes: 9th and final biome card set. Cycle 8: 20 cards, Avalon/island themes, niamh 14/20 options (70%), all quotas met.
